messages.content:
Which gives details on how in-depth your study is in exploring the research question and the parameters in which it will operate concerning relation to the population and the timeframe? 
*
1 point
A. Delimitation
B. Limitation
C. Research question
D. Scope
A. Delimitation

n the study of “Sleep behavior and its relationships to Academic Achievement”, what would be the scope and delimitation of the study? 

*
1 point
A. This study is delimited on the sleep behavior and its relationships to academic achievement of Grades 7-10 junior high school students in Upper Tumapok National High School for the School Year 2017.
B. This study is delimited on the sleep behavior and its relationships to academic achievement of students in Upper Tumapok National High School for the School Year 2017- 2018. The participants in the experiment were chosen by purposive sampling.
C. This study is delimited on the sleep behavior and its relationships of Grades 7-10 junior high school students in Upper Tumapok National High School for the School Year 2017- 2018. The participants in the experiment were chosen by purposive sampling.
D. This study is delimited on the sleep behavior and its relationships to academic achievement of Grades 7-10 junior high school students in Upper Tumapok National High School for the School Year 2017- 2018. The participants in the study were chosen by purposive sampling.

D. This study is delimited on the sleep behavior and its relationships to academic achievement of Grades 7-10 junior high school students in Upper Tumapok National High School for the School Year 2017- 2018. The participants in the study were chosen by purposive sampling.

hich refers to the location or setting of the study where the data will be gathered and to which entity the data will belong? 

*
1 point
A. How
B. When
C. Where
D. Why
C. Where

Which refers to the subject matter of the study and the population from which they will be selected that needs to be large enough to be able to generalize? 
*
1 point
A. Place
B. Process
C. Questions
D. Respondents
D. Respondents

Which of the following statements describes the conceptual framework of the study? 

*
1 point
A. Is a theory regarding the topic under investigation usually shown as figures?
B. Is a theory regarding the topic under investigation usually shown as a diagram?
C. It explains the relationships among variables thus making it easy to understand the arguments advanced by the study.
D. It explains the hypothesized relationships among variables thus making it easy to understand the arguments advanced by the study.
D. It explains the hypothesized relationships among variables thus making it easy to understand the arguments advanced by the study.

Which of the following can be the first statement of the problem for the research problem “A study on the relation between age and internet search engine preference” ? 

*
1 point
A. What is the profile of the respondents in terms of age?
B. What are the internet search engine preferences of the respondents?
C. Is there a significant difference between the age and internet search engine preference of the respondents?
D. Is there a significant difference between the age and internet search engine preference of the respondents?
C. Is there a significant difference between the age and internet search engine preference of the respondents?

n stating research questions using descriptive research, which of the following statements is the most appropriate? 

*
1 point
A. Is the strategy used effective?
B. Would students in classrooms of teachers receiving training on teaching early numeracy skills show better academic performance in mathematics when compared to those in control classrooms?
C. What are the beliefs and attitudes of basic education mathematics teachers regarding teaching students with learning disabilities?
D. Will the use of the Self-Regulated Strategy Development Model for written expression improve the composition skills of students with learning disabilities?
C. What are the beliefs and attitudes of basic education mathematics teachers regarding teaching students with learning disabilities?

Which tentative theory regarding the topic under investigation is usually shown as a diagram? 

*
1 point
A. Background of the study
B. Conceptual framework
C. Scope and delimitations of the study
D. significance of the study
B. Conceptual framework

Between husband and wife or writing and reading, there is a correlative relationship. Which of the following words correspond to the meaning of the underlined word in the sentence? 

*
1 point
A. Close
B. Doubtful
C. Instant
D. Mutual
D. Mutual

Which of the following methods of citation follows the APA referencing style? 

*
1 point
A. Full name first, then followed by initials of first and middle name
B. Full surname first, then followed by initials of first and middle name
C. Full name first, then followed by full first name and optional middle name
D. Full surname first, then followed by full first name and optional middle name
B. Full surname first, then followed by initials of first and middle name

Which citation style below is true about MLA referencing style? 

*
1 point
A. Full name first, then followed by initials of first and middle name
B. Full surname first, then followed by initials of first and middle name
C. Full name first, then followed by full first name and optional middle name
D. Full surname first, then followed by full first name and optional middle name
C. Full name first, then followed by full first name and optional middle name

This part presents the data gathered and the information obtained.

*
1 point
A. Presentation of Data
B. Analysis
C. Recommendation
D. Summary
A. Presentation of Data

Arrange the following questions below to represent a statement of the problem in the study “Sleep behavior and its relationships to Academic Achievement”. 

1. What is the relationship of sleep behavior to the academic performance of the students? 

2. What is the academic achievement of the student? 

3. What is the sleep behavior of the students? 

4. Is there a significant relationship between the sleep behavior and the academic performance of the students? 

*
1 point
A. 2314
B. 3241
C. 3214
D. 2341

What is the purpose of writing a background of the study? 

*
1 point
A. To give readers an overview of the topic
B. To identify research gaps that can be filled in by the study
C. To explain to the readers why the study should be conducted
D. All of the above
D. All of the above

Which discussion part  presents the principles, relationship and generalization shown by the  results. The results need to be compared and interpreted with those in previously published works.

*
1 point
A. Conclusion
B. Analysis and Interpretation
C. Summary
D. Recommendation
B. Analysis and Interpretation

This section includes the summary of the statement of the problem, hypothesis, the research method/design, the respondents, the instrument data gathering procedure and the treatment of data.

*
1 point
A. Summary of the Problem
B. Introduction
C. Conclusion
D. RRL
B. Introduction

In the study ‘’Investigating the Impact of Parent Training in Early Detection and Management of Autism Spectrum Disorder in the Philippines”, which is NOT part of the background?

*
1 point
A.   ASD prevalence is increasing globally, including in the Philippines.
B.     Early detection and intervention are vital for improved outcomes among suspected patients.
C.    Parent training programs involve early detection and lifetime care for the patients.
D.   The underlying reasons for having special children.
D. The underlying reasons for having special children.

What is known as a written synthesis of the related reference materials read for the study such as journal articles, books, and other documents that describe the past and current state of the information about the focus of the study? 

*
1 point
A. Grey Literature
B. Literature Review
C. Referencing Styles
D. Related literature
B. Literature Review

Which source could a researcher get related literature through a published and available database? 

*
1 point
A. E-books
B. Modern Language Association
C. Primary Sources
D. Secondary Sources
D. Secondary Sources

What is a piece of writing that has been copied from someone else and is presented as being your own work (has no citation)? 

*
1 point
A. Database
B. Paraphrase
C. Primary Source
D. Plagiarism
D. Plagiarism

essa found a passage that she wanted to copy as related literature for her research paper. What process of condensing the passage must she do to avoid plagiarism? 
*
1 point
A. Getting the secondary Source
B. Outlining the passage
C. Paraphrasing the passage
D. Summarizing the passage
C. Paraphrasing the passage

Which of the following statements describes Wikipedia as a source of defining terms or words? 

*
1 point
A. Credible source of information
B. Good source of information
C. Lack of credibility
D. Most acceptable source of information
C. Lack of credibility

Which of the following statements below illustrates a null hypothesis? 

*
1 point
A. There is a significant relationship between independent and dependent variables.
B. There is no significant relationship between independent and dependent variables.
C. There is no significant relationship between independent and dependent variables.
D. Both A and B
C. There is no significant relationship between independent and dependent variables.

Which of the following statements below illustrates a null hypothesis? 

*
1 point
A. There is a significant relationship between independent and dependent variables.
B. There is no significant relationship between independent and dependent variables.
C. There is no significant relationship between independent and dependent variables.
D. Both A and B
D. Both A and B

Which of the following is a non-fiction book that a researcher would use for his research topic? 

*
1 point
A. Anthology
B. E-book
C. Electronic Source
D. Reference Book
D. Reference Book
